Practice Bank · Supplemental

Practice Questions

Curriculum-adjacent supplemental items for SH tournaments, leaderboards and daily-challenge gamification. Not wired into formal assessment flow — chapter mastery and EASE growth never read these. Today populated by the IGCSE Tools ExamView import (805 math items).

—
Items in bank
 
—
Active
 
—
Flagged
 
— archived — MCQ — with diagram — source files
bank-wide
Filter

New practice item

Student preview — live as you edit

Item preview

Delete item?

You are about to permanently delete this practice item. This is irreversible — the doc is removed from Firestore with no undo. Re-importing from upstream is the only recovery path.

Type DELETE to confirm:

Flag item

Flagged items are hidden from SH gamification surfaces but stay readable for HQ. Use this for copyright concerns, broken diagrams, or content that needs HQ rewrite.
